meta.project: HelaDry Flutter Web — Solar-Powered IoT Dehydrator Companion

product_overview: HelaDry is a Flutter companion app for a solar-powered food dehydrator. The web build provides authentication, connection mode selection, device pairing and Wi-Fi setup UI, dashboard with metrics, manual controls, batch start, crop guide, records, and settings. The app integrates Firebase Auth and calls a REST backend at http://localhost:5000 for device and session APIs.
core_goals: Allow users to sign in or register via Firebase Auth
Guide users through online/offline connection and pairing flows
Present dashboard, manual controls, and batch management UIs
Surface drying records, crop guide, and configurable settings

features.name: Authentication UI
features.description: Splash, login, and create-account screens with Firebase-backed auth.
user_flows: Open / -> Splash visible then navigate toward login
Open /login -> Enter credentials and submit login

features.name: Connection and pairing
features.description: Choose connection mode, BLE pair flow, and Wi-Fi provisioning wizard.
user_flows: Open /pair-device -> View scan or device list UI
Open /wifi-setup-step1 through step3 -> Progress through wizard

features.name: Main application screens
features.description: Dashboard, controls, batch, guide, records, settings.
user_flows: Open /start-new-batch -> Configure a new drying batch
Open /my-records -> List or empty state for history
Open /settings and /edit-profile -> Adjust preferences and profile
